overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk from a trash-filled back alley through a tree-lined path, up a grand staircase, and along an elevated urban promenade with futuristic skyscrapers and market stalls. Bright sunny day with high-quality ray-traced graphics depicting a dense cyberpunk city.

scene_state.functional_zone: trash-filled back alley with concrete drainage pipes

agents.ego_description: walking through a cluttered back alley filled with garbage bags and construction barriers

entered.detail: scattered blue and white garbage bags piled along the path
large concrete drainage pipe partially buried in dirt
yellow metal construction barriers blocking off areas
large rock face with blue spray-painted graffiti tags
chain-link fence running along the left side

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow, shaded back alley filled with trash bags and construction debris. The camera moves forward past yellow metal barriers and concrete drainage pipes, with dense tree canopy overhead filtering the sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined urban trail with scattered trash

events.description: exits the enclosed trash area into a wider tree-lined path with views of distant skyscrapers

agents.ego_description: proceeding along a shaded dirt path lined with trees and discarded trash bags, approaching the city center

entered.detail: futuristic high-rise buildings visible through the tree canopy in the distance
tall palm trees lining the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The environment transitions from the cluttered alley to a tree-lined urban trail. The path remains dirt-covered with scattered trash bags, but opens up to reveal distant futuristic skyscrapers visible through the foliage, indicating approach toward the city center.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand outdoor staircase leading to elevated plaza

events.description: begins ascending the wide concrete staircase with red railings

agents.ego_description: climbing a long flight of concrete stairs, passing other pedestrians descending

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white clothing descending the stairs toward the camera

entered.detail: wide concrete stairs with multiple flights leading upward
red painted metal handrails lining both sides of the stairs
dark modern building facade with MA signage at the top of the stairs

segments.scene_description: The path transitions to a grand concrete staircase with distinctive red railings. The camera ascends the stairs, passing pedestrians coming down, while the surrounding trees give way to open sky and modern building facades become more prominent.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian promenade with benches and railings

events.description: reaches the top of the stairs and turns onto an elevated walkway with panoramic city views

agents.ego_description: walking along an elevated promenade, glancing at the futuristic cityscape and skyline

entered.detail: wide paved pedestrian walkway with tiled surface
black metal railing with wooden handrail running along the left side
modern benches lined up along the left side of the walkway

segments.scene_description: Upon reaching the top of the stairs, the scene opens onto a wide elevated promenade with metal railings and benches. The camera turns right and proceeds along the walkway, with futuristic skyscrapers now clearly visible in the background against the blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza with market stalls and towering skyscrapers

events.description: camera pans to reveal towering futuristic skyscrapers with digital billboards and steam vents
approaches a market area with food stalls and neon signage

agents.ego_description: walking through a bustling elevated plaza, observing market stalls and large digital advertisements

notable_agents.action: vendor standing at a white market stall with blue neon trim

entered.detail: futuristic white market kiosk with blue neon lighting and glass display cases
large red digital advertisement with Japanese text on building facade
glowing signage including green 'STUFF' sign and red 'WAGAMAMA MARKET' banner

segments.scene_description: The final segment reveals a vibrant urban plaza with towering glass skyscrapers featuring digital billboards. The camera passes by a market stall with neon signage while pedestrians browse the area, showcasing the dense cyberpunk city atmosphere with steam rising from vents between buildings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a cluttered, shaded back alley into the heart of a vibrant, futuristic urban plaza. It begins by moving through a narrow passage filled with trash bags and construction debris under a filtering tree canopy, which gradually opens into a dirt-covered urban trail where skyscrapers first become visible through the foliage. As the path shifts, the camera ascends a grand concrete staircase with red railings, passing pedestrians while the surrounding greenery gives way to open sky and modern facades. Upon reaching the top, the scene expands onto a wide elevated promenade with metal railings before turning toward a dense city center. The movement finally culminates in a bustling plaza characterized by towering glass skyscrapers, digital billboards, and neon-lit market stalls with steam rising from vents between the buildings.
